explicit_text: I currently live in Puyallup, Washington, which has been one of my main residences alongside Seattle. I also had a residence in Tacoma within the past year, so I’m quite familiar with the Puget Sound area. Living in Puyallup has allowed me to stay connected to the communities and labor movements throughout the region.

explicit_text: I have a strong connection to Seattle, Washington, where I work at Harborview Medical Center in the Emergency Room. The city has been central to my professional and activist life.

explicit_text: I have been working at Harborview Medical Center’s Emergency Room for nearly twenty-two years as a Patient Service Specialist. This is my primary place of employment, and I am deeply involved in the union there, Local 3488. Harborview has been central to my career and labor activism in Seattle.

explicit_text: Local 3488 is my union at Harborview Medical Center, and I currently serve as Vice President-Acting President. entity: American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations
explicit_text: The American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (AFL-CIO) is a major umbrella organization for labor unions, including those I am part of. I attended my first AFL-CIO meeting in Cleveland, where I was inspired by powerful women leaders. The AFL-CIO has a rich history tied to labor rights and civil rights movements, including Martin Luther King Jr.’s marches in the 1960s.

explicit_text: Martin Luther King Jr. was a pivotal figure in the labor movement, especially during the 1960s when he marched for workers' rights and fair wages. His leadership connected civil rights with labor rights, which deeply influences my activism today. I often reflect on his legacy as I participate in unions and community organizing.

explicit_text: April Sims is the first African American to hold a head position in the Washington state AFL-CIO, which is a significant milestone. I proudly recognize her leadership as a sign of progress within the labor movement here. Her role inspires me and others in the community to continue pushing for representation and equity.
implicit_text: The first African American to hold a head position in the state-level federation of labor unions is a significant milestone. explicit_text: At Harborview Medical Center, I often work closely with American Medical Response (AMR) personnel as they bring patients into the Emergency Room. I am usually at the first point of contact greeting medics and coordinating patient transfers. AMR is a critical partner in the emergency care process where I work daily.
implicit_text: At the major Seattle hospital, I often work closely with emergency medical personnel from a private ambulance service as they bring patients into the Emergency Room. I am usually at the first point of contact greeting medics and coordinating patient transfers. This ambulance service is a critical partner in the emergency care process where I work daily.
